svg.title: Stock Screener Architecture, API Endpoints, and Open Source Package Map
svg.desc: Architecture diagram for the local stock screener showing user entry points, Flask web server, route endpoints, Python screening modules, external FMP and SEC API providers, local cache and outputs, and open source libraries used by the project.
svg.text: Local Python app with a Flask web UI, explicit route endpoints, FMP/SEC data providers, cached API responses, CSV/Excel/SQLite outputs, and package dependencies.
CLI commands and Flask app factory
serves HTML, static files, JSON APIs
Data provider APIs and local persistence
Each endpoint is implemented in main.py and served by the local Flask server.
Logo-style badges are self-contained SVG marks.

g.text: local web server and API routes
HTTP calls to FMP and SEC APIs
financial logic and web state tests
